signs: Uruhu rw'umutuku, rufite amabuku, cyangwa rwatsi
dos: Subiza aho gutwika hageze amazi atariho ubushyuhe bwinshi (si y'amabuye) iminota 10 kugeza 20
Funika neza ukoresheje umwenda usukuye udafite ubwoya cyangwa plastike
Vana inpete cyangwa imyenda yafashe aho gutwika hageze mbere y'uko byimba
Tanga paracetamol niba ibibazo biri hano
donts: NTUKORESHE urubura, amavuta, ubuteye, cyangwa amavuta ku gutwika
NTUVANE amabuku
NTUKUREHO imyenda yafashe aho gutwika hageze
NTUKORESHE pamba ya kashe ku kibikomere
urgent: Gira ubuvuzi bwa vuba niba gutwika kuri munsi yo gutwika ni binini kuruta ikiganza cyawe, kuri mu maso/amaboko/indangagaciro, cyangwa ni kujya mu nzira kandi nta bububabare (inabi y'inzira z'imyuka).

signs: Umuntu mweru, ukonje, cyangwa ufite ibibazo by'ubwenge
dos: Shyira agaheto gakomeye aho kibikomere neza ukoresheje umwenda usukuye
Komeza gucinza — ntukureho umwenda (ongeraho undi hejuru niba wasuye amaraso)
Dura aho gutemwe hejuru y'umutima niba bishoboka
Umuntu arindire akaguma ari kimwe kandi abe ubushyuhe
donts: NTUKUREHO umwenda kugira ngo urebe kibikomere
NTUKORESHE tourniquet keretse wafashwe kandi gusa ku maguru n'amaboko afite amaraso menshi yica
NTUMPE ibyo kurya cyangwa amazi niba bashobora gukora ubuvuzi bw'inzara
urgent: Amaraso menshi yose asaba ubuvuzi bw'ihutirwa bwa kiliniki cyangwa ibitaro. Hamagara inkunga vuba.

signs: Mu maso hahinduka ubururu cyangwa umutuku
dos: Mwumvishe gukorora neza niba ashoboye
Umubuke inkokora 5 zagize nako hagati y'amafupa y'amagara
Niba inkokora zidakoze: mubuke inkokora 5 z'inda (Heimlich maneuver)
Ku bana bato: gusa ukoresheje inkokora nziza zo mu mugongo n'agatima gusa
donts: NTUKORE inkokora z'inda ku bana bato bari munsi y'umwaka umwe
NTUKORE gushyira urutoki mu kanwa k'indorerwamo
NTUMPE amazi cyangwa ibyo kurya
urgent: Niba inzira y'umwuka idafunguwe nyuma y'inkokora n'agaheto, hamagara inkunga y'ihutirwa vuba.

signs: Uruhu rw'umweru kandi rufite ivyi mbere yo guturira
dos: Ryamisha umuntu inyuma ku mugongo
Dura amaguru ye cm 30 hejuru y'umutima niba bishoboka
Fungura imyenda ifashe ku ijosi no mu rukanda
Muhe umuyaga kandi muvugishe mu mahoro akimara gusubira mu bwenge
donts: NTUMPE amazi cyangwa ibyo kurya kugeza azi neza
NTUMUSIГЕ wenyine
NTUMUKANGURE vuba vuba
urgent: Gira ubuvuzi niba umuntu adasubira mu bwenge mu minota 1 kugeza 2, cyangwa niba afite ububabare bw'agatima, ibibazo byo guhumeka, cyangwa guhinda umushyitsi.

signs: Isesemi, indwara y'ibizunguzungu, cyangwa ibibazo byo guhumeka
dos: Umuntu arindire akaguma ari kimwe — kujya aho no hose bishlesha ubumara vuba
Komeza igice cy'umubiri cyahumwe kiri munsi cyangwa ku rwego rw'umutima
Vana isaha, inete, cyangwa imyenda yafashe aho guhumwa hageze
Genda kwa muganga cyangwa ibitaro vuba ushobora
donts: NTUCIRE kibikomere kandi NTAGERAGEZA gukamura ubumara
NTUKORESHE urubura cyangwa tourniquet
NTUMPE inzoga cyangwa ibyo kurya
NTAGERAGEZE gufata inzoka
urgent: Guhumwa n'inzoka KOSE bigomba gufatwa nk'ihutirwa rya muganga. Genda vuba ku kigo cy'ubuzima gifite imiti y'ubumara.

signs: Amaso aryamye, indwara y'ibizunguzungu, umutima wihuta
dos: Tanga ORS (Oral Rehydration Solution) gake gake kenshi
Niba ORS idahari: tanganya liti 1 y'amazi + inkorora 6 za sukari + inkorora igice cya chumvi
Komeza gutanga amazi nubwo asesemura — gake kenshi
Ku bana bato: komeza konsa kandi wongere ORS
donts: NTUMPE amazi gusa mu bihe bikomeye (bibura ingenga z'umubiri)
NTUKORESHE soda cyangwa amashyushyu mu cyimbo
NTIREBA gutakaza amazi mu bana — bihuta cyane
urgent: Gira ubuvuzi bw'ihutirwa niba umuntu adashoboye gukomeza amazi, aba ata bwenge, yari kuri fontanelle ifite impemu (bana bato), cyangwa atakaye nk'amasaha 8.

signs: Ukangara cyangwa utura utuzi nyuma y'ibyabaye
dos: Bara igihe cy'umushyitsi — sobanukirwa ubwo watangiriye
Kurinda umutwe ukoresheje ikintu cyoroshye munsi
Nyuma y'umushyitsi, hindura umuntu inzira nziza (recovery position)
Guma nawe kugeza azi neza
donts: NTUSHYIRE umuntu agaheto cyangwa ukamugumya
NTUSHYIRE kintu mu kanwa ke
NTUMPE amazi cyangwa ibyo kurya mu gihe cya cyangwa vuba nyuma ya
urgent: Hamagara inkunga niba: umushyitsi urambye iminota 5, umuntu adasubira mu bwenge, ni bwa mbere bigenda, cyangwa yakomekejwe.

signs: Ukangara, kuvuga nabi, cyangwa gutakaza ubwenge
dos: Muve mu zuba cyangwa aho hashyuha vuba
Subiza umubiri vuba — imyenda yujujwe amazi ku ijosi, mu bikanu, mu bisinzi
Muhe umuyaga cyane ukoresheje amazi mato
Niba azi kandi ashoboye kunywa, muhe amazi mato
donts: NTUMPE aspirine cyangwa paracetamol (ntabwo bifasha ikirere cy'ishyarira)
NTUMSIZE mu zuba cyangwa aho hashyuha
NTUMPE amazi niba ata bwenge — inzira yo gutanya
urgent: Gukubitwa n'ikirere cy'ishyarira ni ibyihutirwa bya muganga. Genda ibitaro vuba uri kumsubiza ubushyuhe buke.
